   friends — free organic traffic to raynatours.com
   <https://www.google.com/url?q=http://raynatours.com&source=gmail&ust=1780927056327000&sa=E>
   - Schools promote the competition — free visibility across their parent
   and student networks
   - Rayna is positioned as a company that invests in young talent and
   education — powerful brand association
   - Winner announcement at award ceremonies — adds excitement and prestige
   to the programme

*What you need to do:*

   1. Present this competition to every partner school as a flagship
   programme — not just a one-time event
   2. Get schools to formally announce it to students and parents at the
   start of every term
   3. Ensure every entry comes through the Rayna app — this is mandatory
   4. Collect all submissions and send to Alok's content team monthly for
   review and publication
   5. Announce winners at school award ceremonies and via school WhatsApp
   groups

*Alok and Aparna — note for you:*
You will receive monthly student article submissions from Rishi's team.
Review, select winners, publish the best articles on raynatours.com
<https://www.google.com/url?q=http://raynatours.com&source=gmail&ust=1780927056327000&sa=E>
under a dedicated "Student Travel Writers" section. Each published article
must be SEO and AEO optimized before going live. This is a continuous
stream of fresh human-written content that directly supports our SEO, AEO,
and Wikipedia authority building strategy.

This programme costs us almost nothing. The prizes are experiences we
already own. The content we receive in return is worth far more than any
content agency we could hire.

*Your experience, our responsibility.*

emails.subject: Schools, Universities & Edutainment — Complete Brief | Azhar + Rishi
emails.cc:
senthil@raynatours.com, Vaibhav Gupta <vaibhav@raynatours.com>, 
	Deepak Hiranandani <deepak@raynatours.com>, ranjan@raynab2b.com, nihad@raynatours.com, 
	malik@raynatours.com
emails.body:
Hi Azhar and Rishi,

This brief covers the Schools, Universities, and Edutainment segment. Azhar
— you oversee this as part of your overall partnerships mandate. Rishi —
you are heading the edutainment segment on the ground and this brief is
primarily for you to execute. Both of you must read this fully and align.

We are expanding this segment from UAE to Saudi Arabia and India. Same
playbook, dedicated people in each market, replicated under Rishi's
leadership.
------------------------------

*WHAT EDUTAINMENT COVERS*

   - Day trips — local school and university day excursions
   - Team building activities — desert safari, water sports, balloon,
   yacht, floating restaurant for school and university groups
   - Domestic overnight trips
   - Overseas educational trips — 116 destinations worldwide. Thailand,
   Singapore, Bali, London, Japan and more.

------------------------------

*RISHI — RECRUITMENT*

   1. *One Edutainment Manager for Saudi Arabia* — based in Riyadh. Arabic
   speaking, strong school and university relationships.
   2. *One Edutainment Manager for India* — based in Pune. Strong school
   relationships in Maharashtra and North India.

Job descriptions to Pari by *June 15th.* Both hired by *June 30th.*
Onboarded and trained by *July 15th.* First school visits in both markets
by *July 31st.*
------------------------------

*HOW TO APPROACH SCHOOLS AND UNIVERSITIES*

Decision maker is the Principal, Vice Principal for co-curricular
activities, PTA chairperson, or student affairs department at universities.

At every visit:

   1. Show them who Rayna is — 15 years, 25 million guests, owned assets,
   116 destinations worldwide
   2. Present the complete edutainment portfolio — day trips to full
   overseas educational tours
   3. Offer competitive group rates — work with Ranjan and destination
   heads for best group pricing
   4. Build annual relationships — schools renew every year. Become their
   permanent preferred operator.

As new destinations go live — immediately brief school contacts on new
overseas trip options. Schools plan 6-12 months ahead. Get into their
planning cycle early.
------------------------------

*APP DOWNLOAD — MANDATORY FOR ALL CAMPAIGNS*

Every campaign, competition, award, and giveaway we run in schools must
require the Rayna app download as the entry mechanism. No app download — no
participation. This applies to students and parents equally.

This serves two purposes — we build our app user base from a completely new
audience segment, and every participant enters our ecosystem where we can
communicate with them permanently through push notifications and app-based
campaigns.

Work with Malik to ensure the app registration flow connects directly to
our giveaway and affiliate campaign platform. Students and parents who
download the app must be able to see and participate in all live campaigns
immediately.
------------------------------

*SCHOOL ENGAGEMENT PROGRAMMES — UNDER AFFILIATE PLATFORM*

All school campaigns must be set up under our affiliate programme. Each
school is registered as a Rayna affiliate. The school's dedicated affiliate
link connects to our campaign platform where all active giveaways and
competitions are visible. Teachers announce campaigns to students and
parents. Students and parents download the app, register through the
school's affiliate link, and participate. This way every participation is
tracked back to the school, and schools earn recognition for driving
engagement.

*Programme 1 — Academic Achievement Award sponsored by Rayna*
Rayna sponsors a monthly or termly "Best Student" or "Most Improved
Student" award. Winning student and family receive a free Rayna experience
— balloon, water sports, safari, or yacht. Announced publicly at assembly
or parent teacher meeting.

To win — student must have the Rayna app downloaded and be registered. This
drives app downloads among students and through them, their parents. Kids
work harder knowing there is a prize. School gets better academic
performance. We get permanent brand presence at almost zero cost —
announced every term, every year.

*Programme 2 — Parent Teacher Meeting Lucky Draw*
Rayna sponsors a lucky draw at every PTM. Every attending parent who
downloads the Rayna app and registers gets one entry. Winner announced at
the end of the evening — free family balloon ride, yacht trip, or safari.
Announced publicly in front of all parents.

Parents who skip PTMs now want to attend. School gets better parent
engagement. Rayna gets in front of every parent in the school in one
evening. Every attending parent is now in our app and database.

*Programme 3 — End of Term Class Competition*
Best class by attendance or grades wins a free Rayna group day trip. Every
student in the class must have the Rayna app downloaded to qualify. Kids
compete. Teachers motivated. Principal loves the results. 30-40 kids
experience Rayna together and every parent hears about it.

*Programme 4 — My Dream Holiday Competition*
Drawing or essay competition — where does your family want to travel?
Winners get a free family experience. Entry via the Rayna app only. Parent
email and WhatsApp required. Every entry is a parent in our database.
------------------------------

*SCHOOL AWARD CEREMONIES — BRAND ACTIVATION*

Every school holds an annual award ceremony — end of year, sports day,
graduation. These are the moments when every student, parent, and teacher
is in one room together. This is where Rayna must be present.

Approach every partner school to sponsor their annual award ceremony. What
Rayna provides:

   - *Branded screen sponsorship* — a 15-20 second Rayna brand video plays
   on the main screen behind the stage during the ceremony. Every parent,
   student, and teacher sees it. This is premium brand visibility at a
   fraction of what a TV ad would cost.
   - *Rayna popup stand at the venue* — same configurations as our
   corporate roadshows. Staff present, app download QR codes, giveaway
   registration, family packages on display.
   - *Sponsored giveaway prizes* — Rayna announces free giveaway prizes at
   the ceremony. "Rayna Tours is giving one lucky family a free hot air
   balloon ride — scan this QR code to enter." Excitement fills the room.
   Every parent scans. Every parent downloads the app.
   - *Co-branded event recognition* — "This award ceremony is proudly
   sponsored by Rayna Tours — your experience, our responsibility." Announced
   by the principal. Printed on event materials. Posted on school social media.

The cost — a balloon ride, a safari, a water sports session. All owned by
us. The return — brand presence in front of every parent, student, and
teacher at every partner school, once a year minimum.
------------------------------

*REACHING PARENTS — DATABASE STRATEGY*

Every school programme drives parent app downloads and database
registrations:

   - Family Trip Card — every child takes home a Rayna card after every
   school trip. QR code for family discount. Parent downloads app to claim.
   - All competition entries — via app only. Parent WhatsApp and email
   required.
   - PTM lucky draw — app download required to enter.
   - Award ceremony QR codes — parent scans, downloads app, registers.
   - Achievement award announcements — sent to school WhatsApp groups with
   app download link.

Once a parent downloads the app and registers — they receive all our
campaigns, holiday packages, visa offers, and giveaway campaigns
automatically. One school relationship generates hundreds of parent
contacts directly into our ecosystem.
------------------------------

*OVERSEAS EDUCATIONAL TRIPS*

116 cities worldwide. Thailand, Singapore, Japan, London, Europe, Americas
— all Rayna coordinated end to end. Flights, hotels, activities, transfers,
visa assistance, local guide. No other edutainment operator in UAE can
offer this range. As each destination goes live — build a school trip
pipeline immediately.
------------------------------

*TARGET INSTITUTIONS*

*UAE:* GEMS, Taaleem, Axiom, ADNOC schools, government schools, American
University of Sharjah, University of Dubai, Khalifa University, Heriot-Watt
Dubai, Middlesex University Dubai

*Saudi:* International schools Riyadh and Jeddah, SABIS, Saudi Aramco
schools, King Abdulaziz University, King Saud University, KAUST

*India:* CBSE and ICSE schools in Pune, Mumbai, Delhi, Chandigarh.
Engineering and MBA colleges Pune tech corridor. Delhi University colleges.
------------------------------

*TRACKING*
Update the Google Sheet after every school visit, campaign, and ceremony
activation.

Sheet link:
https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1mjl0OiNEpb4S1Gm-yUCg4H3cbg_MeNA2745KT_lY5bI
<https://www.google.com/url?q=https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1mjl0OiNEpb4S1Gm-yUCg4H3cbg_MeNA2745KT_lY5bI&source=gmail&ust=1780926315063000&sa=E>
------------------------------

*DEADLINES*

   - June 15th — Job descriptions for Saudi and India Edutainment Managers
   to Pari
   - June 30th — Both managers hired
   - July 15th — Both managers onboarded and trained
   - July 31st — First school visits in Saudi and India completed
   - August — All parent campaigns and school engagement programmes live in
   all three markets
   - September — Academic achievement awards, PTM lucky draws, and award
   ceremony sponsorships running in all partner schools

Rishi — schools give us access to students, parents, and the community
simultaneously. Three revenue streams from one relationship — edutainment
trips, parent holidays, community referrals. The engagement programmes
above cost us almost nothing but create emotional connections no
advertisement can replicate. Build this properly and it compounds every
year.

Azhar — please ensure Rishi has everything he needs and that Saudi and
India recruitment happens on schedule.

*Your experience, our responsibility.*

emails.subject: Rewards Programme Partnerships — Complete Brief + Tracking Sheet | Azhar
emails.body:
Hi Azhar,

This is your second brief — focused entirely on reward programme
partnerships. Please read this carefully. This is one of the biggest
untapped opportunities for Rayna in UAE, and I want you to own it fully
alongside your roadshow and corporate activation work.
------------------------------

*WHY REWARD PROGRAMMES ARE CRITICAL FOR RAYNA*

People spend reward points more freely than cash. When a customer uses ADCB
TouchPoints or Emirates Skywards miles to book a desert safari or a
Thailand holiday, they feel they are getting it for free. There is no
psychological barrier — no hesitation, no price comparison. They just book.
This means reward programme customers convert at significantly higher rates
than regular customers.

On top of that — reward companies want their customers to burn their
points. Unburned points are a liability on their books. When you approach
them as a partner who helps their customers redeem points on meaningful
experiences, they will welcome you. You are solving their problem, not just
selling to them.

Our objective is simple — get Rayna's products in front of millions of UAE
residents who are holding reward points they have not spent. Every reward
company you connect with is a channel into thousands of pre-qualified,
spending-ready customers.
------------------------------

*COMPLETE TARGET LIST — UAE REWARD PROGRAMMES*

*🔴 HIGH PRIORITY — Start immediately:*

   1. *ADCB TouchPoints* — Already in progress technically. You must manage
   the relationship side. Meet the ADCB partnerships team, confirm the
   commercial agreement, and ensure Rayna's products are promoted to their
   TouchPoints customers actively.
   2. *FAB Rewards — First Abu Dhabi Bank* — Second largest bank in UAE.
   Travel redemption already built into their programme. Rayna is a natural
   partner. Approach their partnerships team immediately.
   3. *Emirates Skywards* — Most recognized loyalty programme in the Middle
   East. Their members are frequent travelers — exactly our customer. Approach
   their partnerships and redemption team.
   4. *Etihad Guest* — Etihad Airways loyalty programme. Abu Dhabi base —
   strong UAE resident overlap. Similar approach to Skywards.

*🟡 MEDIUM PRIORITY — Target July-August:*

   1. *Mashreq Salaam* — Points on both credit and debit cards. Wide UAE
   customer base.
   2. *CBD Rewards* — Commercial Bank of Dubai. Online redemption available
   — easy integration.
   3. *ADIB Exceed Rewards* — Abu Dhabi Islamic Bank. Islamic banking
   segment — large UAE customer base. Instant redemption via app.
   4. *Emirates NBD SmartMiles* — Large customer base, travel focused.
   5. *Shukran — Landmark Group* — One of the largest retail rewards
   programmes in Dubai. Millions of members across Home Centre, Max, Splash,
   Centrepoint.
   6. *Blue Rewards — Al Futtaim Group* — Travel and experiences already
   part of their programme. Rayna is a natural redemption partner.

*🟢 GROWTH — Target September onwards:*

   1. Club Apparel — Apparel Group — 75+ brands, large member base
   2. Aura Rewards — Lifestyle coalition programme
   3. Beam Wallet — Coalition loyalty network
   4. Air Arabia Airewards — Budget airline, large UAE resident base
   5. du Points — Millions of UAE telecom subscribers
   6. Etisalat (e&) Rewards — Largest telecom in UAE
   7. DIB Points — Dubai Islamic Bank
   8. RAK Bank Rewards

*Your additional task* — You know the UAE market better than anyone. If you
are aware of any reward programmes not listed above, add them to the
tracker sheet. We do not want to miss any channel.
------------------------------

*HOW TO APPROACH EVERY REWARD COMPANY*

Your objective in every meeting is to agree on one or more of the following:

   1. *Direct API integration* — Customer sees their points balance on
   Rayna's payment page and burns points directly at checkout. This is the
   best outcome. Tech integration handled by Anwar's team once commercial
   agreement is signed.
   2. *Voucher redemption partnership* — Customer redeems points on the
   reward platform and receives a Rayna voucher code. They use the code on
   raynatours.com
   <https://www.google.com/url?q=http://raynatours.com&source=gmail&ust=1780924308033000&sa=E>.
   Faster to implement while API is being built.
   3. *Co-branded email marketing access* — Reward company sends co-branded
   Rayna emails to their members with special offers and coupon codes. You get
   access to their customer base without API integration. This is the minimum
   acceptable outcome from any meeting.
   4. *Gift card partnership* — Rayna gift cards available as a redemption
   option on the reward platform. Customer uses points to buy a Rayna gift
   card and spends it on any service. This is simple to implement and works
   well for retail-focused reward programmes like Shukran and Blue Rewards.

If a company offers a technology connection you have not seen before — or
if you identify a gap in how we can reach their customers — do not try to
solve it yourself. Bring it to Senthil or me immediately. We will find the
solution. Your job is to identify the opportunity and the gap. Our job is
to build the technology to fill it.
------------------------------

*DAILY EMAIL CAMPAIGNS TO REWARD PARTNERS*

Once any reward partnership is signed — that company becomes part of our
daily email campaign distribution. Here is how it works:

   1. Our AI marketing engine sends daily campaigns to Rayna customers
   2. For each reward partner — a co-branded version of the same campaign
   is prepared showing both Rayna and the reward company branding, with a
   special offer and unique coupon code exclusive to their members
   3. This co-branded email goes to the reward company's communication team
   for distribution to their members — or directly to members if they grant us
   access to their email list
   4. Members who click and book enter our database directly. From that
   point we communicate with them directly.

Your job is to negotiate direct email list access wherever possible. If not
possible — ensure the reward company commits to forwarding our co-branded
campaigns to their members on a regular basis. Get this in writing as part
of the partnership agreement.
------------------------------

*YOUR TRACKING SHEET*

I have created a Google Sheet for you to track everything — reward
programmes, roadshows, affiliates, and daily campaigns. Please open it,
bookmark it, and update it after every meeting, roadshow, and campaign send.

*Sheet link:
https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1mjl0OiNEpb4S1Gm-yUCg4H3cbg_MeNA2745KT_lY5bI
<https://www.google.com/url?q=https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1mjl0OiNEpb4S1Gm-yUCg4H3cbg_MeNA2745KT_lY5bI&source=gmail&ust=1780924308033000&sa=E>*

The sheet has four sections:

   - *Rewards Programme Tracker* — all target programmes, priority, contact
   details, meeting status, notes. Update after every contact or meeting.
   - *Corporate Roadshow Tracker* — every roadshow across UAE, Saudi, and
   India. Registrations, app downloads, giveaway entries, affiliate signups,
   bookings converted.
   - *Affiliate Partner Tracker* — every affiliate signed up, type,
   commission eligibility, bookings and revenue generated.
   - *Daily Email Campaign Tracker* — every campaign sent to reward and
   corporate partners, response rates, registrations generated.

I will check this sheet regularly. This is how I will audit your progress
without needing a meeting. Keep it updated — every row, every column, every
week. If the sheet is not updated, I will assume the work is not happening.
------------------------------

*IMPORTANT — YOUR PLATE IS FULL*

I know you now have a lot on your plate — managing UAE, recruiting for
Saudi and India, roadshows, affiliates, and now rewards. I am not asking
you to do all of this alone or immediately.

*Sequence for rewards partnerships:*

   - *June — July:* Focus on the four High Priority programmes — ADCB, FAB,
   Skywards, Etihad. One meeting per week minimum with each.
   - *August:* Medium priority programmes — Mashreq, CBD, ADIB, Shukran,
   Blue Rewards
   - *September onwards:* Growth programmes — as your Saudi and India
   managers are onboarded and running independently, you will have more
   bandwidth for the full list

As soon as your Saudi and India managers are onboarded — brief them on the
rewards strategy for their markets as well. Saudi has its own reward
ecosystem we will brief you on separately.

*Your experience, our responsibility.*

emails.subject: You Are Now Head of Partnerships — UAE, Saudi Arabia & India | Azhar
emails.cc:
senthil@raynatours.com, Vaibhav Gupta <vaibhav@raynatours.com>, nihad@raynatours.com, 
	malik@raynatours.com, anket@raynatours.com, 
	Deepak Hiranandani <deepak@raynatours.com>
emails.body:
Hi Azhar,

I am writing to formally expand your role and responsibility. Effective
immediately, you are appointed as *Head of Partnerships — UAE, Saudi
Arabia, and India.*

Everything we have discussed about corporate partnerships, roadshows,
affiliate programme, app promotion, giveaway campaigns, and daily email
forwarding — all of it applies across all three markets. Your job is to
build, lead, and replicate this across UAE, Saudi, and India simultaneously.

Please read the complete brief sent to you separately covering the full
partnership strategy. That is your playbook. Everything in it applies to
all three markets.
------------------------------

*YOUR EXPANDED MANDATE*

UAE — you are already active here. Continue and accelerate everything as
briefed. UAE is your model market. Everything that works here gets
replicated in Saudi and India.

Saudi Arabia — significant opportunity. Rich market, less competitive,
strong corporate culture. The approach is identical to UAE. Language may
need to be adapted to Arabic for some corporates but the strategy, the
products, the affiliate model, the roadshow mechanics — all the same.

India — starting with Pune and North India clusters. Our Pune office
already has presence. The corporate culture in Pune tech corridor and
Mumbai financial sector is strong. Delhi, Chandigarh, and Ludhiana are high
spending markets. Same approach — roadshows, affiliate programme, daily
email forwarding, app promotion, giveaway campaigns.
------------------------------

*YOUR FIRST PRIORITY — RECRUIT TWO PEOPLE*

You cannot manage three markets alone. I need you to recruit immediately:

   1. *One Partnership Manager for Saudi Arabia* — based in Riyadh. Arabic
   speaking, strong corporate network in Saudi, understands the local
   corporate culture. This person replicates your UAE approach in Saudi.
   2. *One Partnership Manager for India* — based in Pune. Strong corporate
   network in Maharashtra and North India. Understands Indian corporate
   culture — especially IT sector in Pune and financial sector in Mumbai. This
   person replicates your UAE approach in India.

*Recruitment deadline: June 30th.*
I need both people identified, interviewed, and offer letters issued by
June 30th. They should be onboarded and operational by July 15th.

Work with Pari and Senthil on the recruitment process. Share the job
descriptions with Pari by June 15th so the search begins immediately.
------------------------------

*TRAINING AND ONBOARDING*

Once both people are onboarded, you are responsible for training them
fully. Options:

   - Bring them to Dubai for one week — shadow you at roadshows, see the
   complete operation, understand the products, meet the teams. This is the
   fastest way to train.
   - Visit their markets with them for the first few roadshows — introduce
   them to key corporate contacts, demonstrate the approach, then hand over.
   - Regular weekly calls — align on campaigns, offers, new products, and
   performance.

I will personally join a market visit to Saudi and India when the timing is
right to meet key corporates and demonstrate Rayna's commitment to those
markets.
------------------------------

*WHAT STAYS THE SAME ACROSS ALL THREE MARKETS*

   - Roadshow mechanics — spin the wheel, giveaway registration, app
   download, vouchers
   - Affiliate programme — commission and non-commission two-track approach
   - Daily email campaign forwarding to corporate contacts
   - Channel acquisition objective — secure direct communication into every
   corporate
   - App promotion — once live
   - Giveaway campaign integration — once live
   - Reporting structure — weekly report to Vaibhav

*What adapts per market:*

   - Saudi — Arabic language for certain corporates and communications
   - India — Hindi language for certain communications, local cultural
   nuances in approach
   - Product emphasis — in India, international holiday packages and visas
   are the lead product. In Saudi, outbound holiday packages and UAE
   experiences are the lead product.

------------------------------

*IMMEDIATE ACTIONS — THIS WEEK*

   1. *Today* — Acknowledge this appointment and confirm you accept the
   expanded responsibility
   2. *June 15th* — Job descriptions for Saudi and India Partnership
   Managers submitted to Pari
   3. *June 15th* — All UAE popup stand materials updated with new brand
   line and product portfolio — coordinate with Asad
   4. *June 20th* — July UAE roadshow calendar submitted — minimum 8 events
   5. *June 30th* — Both new Partnership Managers identified and offer
   letters issued
   6. *July 15th* — Both new managers onboarded and operational
   7. *July 31st* — First roadshows completed in Saudi and India by new
   managers

------------------------------

*RESOURCES AND SUPPORT*

You will have full support from the Rayna team across all three markets:

   - Vaibhav — marketing campaigns, co-branded email content, giveaway and
   affiliate platform
   - Malik — WhatsApp broadcasting, JetHeads platform, affiliate tracking
   - Anket — performance marketing alignment
   - Nihad — social media support for corporate activations
   - Asad — updated stand designs and marketing materials
   - Ranjan — India destination products and packages
   - Rajkumar — Saudi and Dubai products

Azhar — this is a significant expansion of your role and I am giving it to
you because I trust your ability to execute. The corporate partnership
channel is one of Rayna's most powerful growth levers. You now own it
across three of our most important markets. Make it count.

*Your experience, our responsibility.*

emails.subject: Corporate Partnership Strategy — Complete Updated Brief | Azhar
emails.cc:
senthil@raynatours.com, Vaibhav Gupta <vaibhav@raynatours.com>, nihad@raynatours.com, 
	malik@raynatours.com, anket@raynatours.com
emails.body:
Hi Azhar,

I want to completely realign your team's approach to corporate partnerships
and roadshows. Please read this fully — this is not just about doing
roadshows. This is about building a permanent channel into every corporate
in UAE so we can communicate with their employees directly, consistently,
and at scale.
------------------------------

*THE BIGGER PICTURE — WHAT WE ARE BUILDING*

Rayna is no longer just a Dubai activities company. We are a complete
travel platform — international holiday packages, visas, cruises,
attractions, transfers, and soon 116 destinations worldwide. We are adding
20-25 new cities to our holiday portfolio every month. We have an app
launching very soon. We are launching a giveaway campaign platform. We are
launching an affiliate programme.

Your team sits at the center of all of this for the UAE corporate market.
Every corporate you engage is not just a roadshow opportunity — it is a
channel into hundreds or thousands of employees who are not yet in our
database. Your job is to open that channel and keep it open permanently.
------------------------------

*PART ONE — POPUP STANDS AND ROADSHOWS*

*Update all materials immediately:*
Everything on your popup stands must be updated. We are no longer selling
only Dubai activities. Your stands must reflect the complete Rayna
portfolio:

   - International holiday packages — Thailand, Bali, Singapore, Malaysia,
   Maldives, Georgia, London, Japan, Europe, Americas — and growing by 20-25
   cities every month
   - International visas — Schengen, USA, UK, and worldwide
   - Dubai attractions and activities
   - Water sports, desert safari, balloon, yacht, cruise, floating
   restaurant
   - Cruises

Coordinate with Asad immediately to update all banner designs, counter
graphics, and printed materials with the new brand line, new destination
portfolio, and full product range. Do not go to a single roadshow with old
materials.

*The objective of every roadshow has two layers:*

*Layer 1 — Physical activation:* Engage as many employees as possible
during the event. Spin the wheel, giveaway registration, app download,
vouchers. Every person who interacts with you must register on the Rayna
platform or download the app before they leave.

*Layer 2 — Channel acquisition (More important):* A roadshow is a physical
activity. It requires your team's time and presence. But if after the
roadshow you have a direct communication channel into that corporate — the
procurement team, the HR team, an affiliate employee — then every future
offer, campaign, and update reaches their employees automatically without
you needing to be physically present. This is the real value of every
roadshow. Do not leave any corporate without securing a direct
communication channel.

*How to secure the channel:*

   - Get the procurement or HR manager's email and WhatsApp during the
   roadshow
   - Register them as a Rayna affiliate or corporate partner before you
   leave
   - From that point forward — every email campaign Rayna sends to its
   customers gets forwarded to that contact to distribute to their employees

------------------------------

*PART TWO — AFFILIATE PROGRAMME*

We are launching a formal affiliate programme very soon. Every corporate
employee can become a Rayna affiliate — they share our offers with their
friends and family and earn commission on every booking made through their
link.

However — some organizations, especially banks and government entities, do
not allow their employees to receive personal commission. For these
organizations, your approach must be different:

   - *Commission-friendly organizations* — offer the full affiliate
   programme. Employee registers, gets unique link, earns commission on every
   booking through their link.
   - *Non-commission organizations* — offer discount coupons only for their
   employees and customers. Any commission generated can be converted into
   team building activities — we sponsor a desert safari, yacht trip, or
   activity for their team. This way the organization benefits collectively
   rather than individual employees receiving cash.

You must know which type of organization you are dealing with before you
approach them. Prepare separate proposal documents for each type — one for
commission-friendly, one for non-commission. Have both ready before every
roadshow.
------------------------------

*PART THREE — APP PROMOTION*

Our app is launching very soon — UAE first. As soon as the app is live and
properly tested, promoting app downloads becomes a core part of every
roadshow and every corporate communication.

Stay in close contact with Gaurav and the product team. The moment the app
is confirmed live — update all your roadshow materials, corporate emails,
and WhatsApp communications to include app download as the primary call to
action.

At roadshows — every employee who engages with you must download the app on
the spot. Staff should assist them. The app download is the most valuable
outcome of any roadshow interaction because once the app is on their phone,
we have a permanent push notification channel to them.

Giveaway participation will also happen through the app. So app download
and giveaway participation become one combined action at every roadshow.
------------------------------

*PART FOUR — GIVEAWAY CAMPAIGNS*

Our giveaway platform is launching very soon. Start preparing your team and
your corporate contacts now so you are ready to activate immediately when
it goes live.

At every roadshow — promote the upcoming giveaway. Tell employees: "We are
launching a massive giveaway very soon — free holiday packages, balloon
rides, safari, yacht experiences — completely free to participate. Download
our app and you will be the first to know when it launches."

Once giveaway is live — every roadshow becomes a giveaway activation event.
Spin the wheel prizes connect to giveaway entries. App downloads connect to
giveaway participation. Corporate HR forwards giveaway links to all
employees. This creates a viral loop within every corporate.
------------------------------

*PART FIVE — DAILY EMAIL CAMPAIGN FORWARDING*

This is one of the most important things I want you to implement
immediately.

Our AI marketing engine sends daily email campaigns to our existing
customer database. But corporate employees who are not yet in our database
never see these campaigns. You are the bridge.

Here is the process I want you to build:

   1. Every day — Anket's team sends you the latest Rayna email campaign
   2. You or your team forwards this campaign to the procurement or HR
   contact at every registered corporate partner
   3. That contact forwards it to all employees — or you request them to do
   so as part of the partnership agreement
   4. For key corporate partners — we create a co-branded version of the
   email showing both the corporate logo and Rayna logo, with a special
   discount exclusive to their employees. This makes the corporate look good
   to their employees and makes our offer more compelling.
   5. As employees click and register on Rayna — they enter our database
   directly. From that point we communicate with them directly.

This daily forwarding process must become an automatic practice. Not
occasionally — every day. Coordinate with Anket and Malik to make sure you
receive the right campaign content daily and that co-branded versions are
prepared for key partners.
------------------------------

*PART SIX — STAYING ALIGNED WITH RAYNA'S PRODUCTS AND TECHNOLOGY*

Your team must be the most informed team in Rayna when it comes to what we
offer and what is coming. You cannot sell what you don't know about.

I expect the following from you:

   - *Weekly alignment call with Vaibhav* — what new destinations went live
   this week, what campaigns are running, what offers are available, what
   technology is launching
   - *Immediate update when app launches* — full briefing for your team on
   app features and how to demonstrate it at roadshows
   - *Immediate update when giveaway launches* — full briefing on
   participation mechanics and how to integrate into roadshows
   - *Immediate update when affiliate programme launches* — full briefing
   on commission structure, who qualifies, and the two-track approach for
   commission and non-commission organizations

You should never be in a situation where a corporate employee knows
something about Rayna that you don't. Stay ahead.
------------------------------

*FREQUENCY AND TARGETS*

   - *July 2026* — Restart at 8-10 roadshows per month. Summer focus —
   international holiday packages. Every roadshow secures a direct corporate
   communication channel.
   - *August 2026* — Scale to 12-15 per month
   - *September 2026* — 15-20 per month aligned with full campaign launch

------------------------------

*REPORTING — EVERY ROADSHOW*

After every event, submit a report to Vaibhav covering:

   - Company name and location
   - Number of employees engaged
   - Number of app downloads
   - Number of registrations collected
   - Number of giveaway entries
   - Number of affiliate sign-ups
   - Corporate contact secured — name, email, WhatsApp
   - Type of partnership agreed — commission or non-commission
   - Number of bookings converted within 30 days

------------------------------

*TWO IMMEDIATE ACTIONS:*

   1. *By June 15th* — Update all popup stand materials with new brand
   line, full product range, and destination portfolio. Coordinate with Asad.
   2. *By June 20th* — Submit July roadshow calendar — minimum 8 events —
   and prepare two affiliate proposal documents: one for commission-friendly
   organizations and one for non-commission organizations.

Azhar — the corporate channel is one of Rayna's most powerful and
underutilized assets. You have the relationships. We now have the products,
the technology, and the campaigns to back you up. Let's make the most of it.

*Your experience, our responsibility.*

senthil@raynatours.com, Vaibhav Gupta <vaibhav@raynatours.com>, ww_anowar@yahoo.com, 
	Deepak Hiranandani <deepak@raynatours.com>, aparna@raynatours.com, manish.y@raynatours.com, 
	asad@raynatours.com, nihad@raynatours.com, anket@raynatours.com, 
	malik@raynatours.com, azhar@raynatours.com, ranjan@raynab2b.com, 
	rajkumar@raynatours.com, adnan@raynab2b.com, alok@raynatours.com, 
	Pari <pari@raynatours.com>, gaurav.verma@raynatours.com, 
	manoj.gagwani@raynatours.com, sunil.p@raynab2b.com
emails.body:
Hi Team,

Over the past few days you have received a number of detailed, structured
emails from me covering strategy, tasks, deadlines, and direction across
multiple workstreams. I want to share with you how these were prepared —
and more importantly, I want you to start doing the same.

I have been using *Claude by Anthropic* — an AI assistant — as my daily
working partner. Not just for writing emails. For thinking through
strategy, managing my calendar, checking my inbox, drafting responses,
setting reminders, researching markets, building documents, and keeping
track of every task across every workstream simultaneously.

The result — I have covered more ground in the last few days than would
normally take weeks. Every email you received from me was researched,
thought through, and drafted with Claude's assistance. Every calendar
reminder was set automatically. Every follow-up was tracked.

*I want each of you to start using Claude immediately.*

Here is how to get started:

   1. Go to *claude.ai
   <https://www.google.com/url?q=http://claude.ai&source=gmail&ust=1780920473902000&sa=E>*
   on your phone or desktop
   2. Create a free account — or upgrade to Claude Pro for full capability
   (approximately $20 per month — expense this to the company)
   3. Connect your Gmail and Google Calendar to Claude — this allows Claude
   to read your emails, draft responses, and set calendar reminders directly
   4. Start using it for every email you write, every task you need to
   track, every research question you have

*Specific ways I want you to use Claude in your daily work:*

   - *Emails* — before writing any important email, tell Claude what you
   want to communicate and ask it to draft it for you. Review, adjust, send.
   This alone will save you hours every week.
   - *Calendar* — every task with a deadline — ask Claude to set a calendar
   reminder immediately. Never rely on memory for deadlines.
   - *Inbox management* — at the start of every day, ask Claude to check
   your inbox and summarize what needs your attention. Prioritize accordingly.
   - *Research* — before any supplier meeting, partner negotiation, or
   market entry — ask Claude to research the topic and give you a briefing. Go
   into every meeting informed.
   - *Task tracking* — use Claude to maintain your own task list. At the
   end of every day, tell Claude what was completed and what is pending. Start
   the next day with a clear picture.
   - *Strategy and problem solving* — when you face a challenge or need to
   think through a decision, discuss it with Claude first. It will challenge
   your thinking, flag risks you haven't considered, and help you arrive at
   better decisions faster.

*What I expect:*

   - Every email you send to me or to your team should be clear,
   structured, and complete. No more one-line replies. If Claude helps you
   write better emails — use it.
   - Every deadline you commit to should be in your calendar. No excuses
   for missing deadlines because you forgot.
   - Response time to my emails — maximum 24 hours on weekdays. Claude can
   help you draft a response in minutes even when you are busy.

We are a company that is transforming through AI. I cannot ask our
customers and the market to trust our AI capabilities if our own team is
not using AI in their daily work. Lead by example. Start today.

If you have any questions on how to use Claude or need help getting started
— ask Vaibhav or Malik. They are already using it and can guide you.

*Your experience, our responsibility.*

emails.subject: Multi-Agent Infrastructure — Rayna's AI Operating System | Senthil + Anwar Co-Own
emails.cc:
Vaibhav Gupta <vaibhav@raynatours.com>, Deepak Hiranandani <deepak@raynatours.com>, alok@raynatours.com, 
	adnan@raynab2b.com
emails.body:
Hi Senthil and Anwar,

I want to share with you one of the most important strategic initiatives we
are undertaking at Rayna. Please read this fully and together. Alok and
Adnan are CC'd as their work directly feeds into this infrastructure.

We are currently building several AI agents — content, marketing,
reservation, pricing. Each is being built as a standalone project. This is
the right start. But standalone agents that don't communicate with each
other will create the same silo problem we have with humans. Each agent
will work hard for its own piece but nothing will be connected.

I want to fix this before it becomes a problem. And I want both of you to
own it together.
------------------------------

*THE VISION — RAYNA'S COMPLETE MULTI-AGENT INFRASTRUCTURE*

Every function in Rayna — content, marketing, reservations, operations,
finance, HR, legal, compliance — will eventually have an AI agent handling
the repetitive, administrative, and coordination work. These agents will
not work in isolation. They will communicate through a shared intelligence
layer — reading from and writing to a central company knowledge base. When
one agent takes an action, every other relevant agent knows and responds
accordingly.

Think of it as building Rayna's AI nervous system. Once the infrastructure
exists, adding a new agent is as simple as onboarding a new employee. The
framework handles the coordination. We provide the intelligence.
------------------------------

*WHY BOTH OF YOU ARE THE RIGHT PEOPLE TO OWN THIS*

This project requires someone who understands technology deeply AND
understands Rayna's business completely. Both of you have exactly that
combination — and that is rare.

Senthil — you are MCA qualified. You understand code, databases, and
infrastructure at a technical level. You have also been in this industry
for 15 years and understand every business process, every department, and
every workflow at Rayna. You are not just a CEO — you are a technically
capable business leader who can challenge architecture decisions and ensure
the system is built correctly for the business.

Anwar — you are our CTO and have been with Rayna for 15 years. In that time
you have not just built our technology — you have absorbed the complete
Rayna business. You understand how we operate, how we make money, where the
problems are, and what the technology needs to solve. You carry my
experience and knowledge of this business inside your technical thinking.
That combination is what makes you the right person to architect this
system.

Together you bring everything this project needs — technical depth,
business intelligence, and 30 combined years of Rayna knowledge. I am
putting this in your hands with full confidence.

*Alok* — your content block is Phase 1 of this infrastructure. The Content
Agent you are building must be designed to communicate with the Marketing
Agent and the Supplier Module from day one. Please read the agent map below
and ensure your current build is compatible with the shared knowledge base
architecture Anwar will design.

*Adnan* — your supplier backend is the product intelligence layer that all
agents depend on. Pricing Agent, Reservation Agent, Content Agent — they
all need accurate real time data from your supplier module. Please ensure
the supplier module has clean API endpoints that agents can read from and
write to.
------------------------------

*THE COMPLETE AGENT MAP — RAYNA'S AI ORGANISATION*

*Level 1 — Founder Agent (Me)*
Sets strategy, goals, and priorities. Does not execute — directs. All major
decisions flow from here.

*Level 2 — CEO Agent (Senthil's counterpart)*
Coordinates all department agents. Receives priorities from Founder Agent
and distributes tasks. Monitors overall performance. Escalates issues that
require human judgment.

*Level 3 — Department Agents*

*Already being built — Phase 1:*

   - *Content Agent* — produces all destination content, SEO and AEO
   optimized, feeds into supplier module. Owner: Alok + CEO team.
   - *Marketing Agent* — converts content to market-ready format,
   distributes across email, WhatsApp, SMS, push, social. Owner: Vaibhav +
   Malik.
   - *Reservation Agent* — handles customer queries, builds holiday
   packages, facilitates bookings, manages post-booking support. Owner: Anwar.
   - *Pricing Agent* — monitors competition prices in real time, suggests
   markup adjustments, connects to supplier module. Owner: Adnan + Anwar.

*Phase 2 — Operations (Build July-August):*

   - *Driver Coordination Agent* — tracks driver locations, coordinates
   pickups, sends automated updates to customers, alerts on delays
   - *Vehicle Management Agent* — tracks all 500+ vehicles — registration
   expiry, insurance renewal, service schedules. Alerts 30 days before any
   expiry.
   - *Post-Booking Support Agent* — handles all customer queries after
   booking. Escalates only when human judgment needed.
   - *Customer Communication Agent* — automated pre-trip communications,
   day-of reminders, post-trip feedback collection

*Phase 3 — Finance and Compliance (Build September-October):*

   - *Receivables Agent* — tracks outstanding payments from B2B agents and
   corporates, sends automated follow-ups
   - *Payables Agent* — manages supplier payments, tracks due dates
   - *Reconciliation Agent* — automatically matches bookings to payments,
   flags discrepancies
   - *HR Documentation Agent* — tracks all 1,600 employee contracts, visa
   expiry dates, license renewals. Alerts HR 60 days before any expiry.
   - *Legal Compliance Agent* — tracks company licenses, regulatory
   deadlines across all 9 offices
   - *MOHRE Compliance Agent* — monitors work permit renewals, visa status,
   flags issues proactively

*Phase 4 — Continuous expansion (Q4 2026 onwards):*
As the infrastructure proves itself, we add new agents continuously. Every
repetitive human task in Rayna is a candidate for an agent.
------------------------------

*THE SHARED KNOWLEDGE BASE — MOST CRITICAL DESIGN DECISION*

Every agent reads from and writes to a central Company Knowledge Base. This
is what makes them a system rather than a collection of tools. The
knowledge base must contain:

   - All products live on the website — inventory, pricing, availability
   - All supplier contracts and pricing
   - All customer bookings and history
   - All marketing campaigns running
   - All performance metrics — bookings, revenue, conversion rates
   - All operational status — vehicles, drivers, scheduled tours
   - Current business goals and priorities from Founder Agent
   - All compliance deadlines — vehicle registrations, employee visas,
   company licenses

The design of this knowledge base is the most important architectural
decision in this entire project. Get this right and everything works. Get
this wrong and agents conflict with each other. Both of you must give this
the most careful thought before any code is written.
------------------------------

*RECOMMENDED TECHNICAL APPROACH*

Do not build the orchestration framework from scratch. Use an existing
proven framework as the backbone:

   - *CrewAI* — purpose-built for multi-agent orchestration, clean Python
   framework
   - *LangGraph* — more flexible, better for complex agent workflows
   - *AutoGen by Microsoft* — strong for agent-to-agent communication

Evaluate all three and choose the one that best fits our existing tech
stack. Build each agent's intelligence in-house using our own prompts,
training data, and business logic. We own the intelligence. The framework
handles the plumbing.
------------------------------

*WHAT I NEED FROM BOTH OF YOU — BY JUNE 20TH*

A joint architecture proposal covering:

   1. *Framework recommendation* — which orchestration framework and why
   2. *Knowledge base design* — what data structure, what database, how
   agents read and write
   3. *Agent communication protocol* — how agents pass information to each
   other, how conflicts are resolved
   4. *Phase 1 integration plan* — how the four existing standalone agents
   get connected first
   5. *Phase 2 and 3 build timeline* — realistic dates for operations and
   finance agents
   6. *Resource requirements* — what additional people or tools are needed

Present this as a document — not a meeting. I want to read it, think about
it, and then we discuss.
------------------------------

*THE BIGGER PICTURE*

When this infrastructure is complete, Rayna will have something no
competitor in our space has built — a fully connected AI operating system
running the entire company. Content to marketing to reservations to
operations to finance to compliance — all agents communicating, all data
shared, all processes automated.

Our human team focuses on judgment, relationships, strategy, and
problem-solving. The agents handle everything else. This is how we scale to
116 cities without scaling headcount proportionally. This is how we become
genuinely difficult to compete with.

This is the most important technology project in Rayna's history. I am
counting on both of you to get it right.

*Your experience, our responsibility.*

emails.subject: Urgent — Compile All Independent Awards for Wikipedia Submission | Deadline June 12th
emails.body:
Hi Aparna and Manish,

This is an urgent task that directly supports our Wikipedia submission and
overall brand authority building.

I need you to compile a complete file of all independent awards and
recognitions Rayna Tours has received. These are awards from organizations
that have no commercial relationship with us — not from our suppliers,
theme park partners, or hotel partners. Independent recognition only.

*WHAT TO LOOK FOR — Examples of the right type of awards:*

   - TripAdvisor — Travelers' Choice, Best of the Best, Certificate of
   Excellence. Any year.
   - Arabian Travel Market (ATM) Awards — any category, any year
   - Arabian Travel Awards — any category, any year
   - Dubai Police recognition or awards
   - Dubai Municipality awards
   - Dubai Tourism / DTCM recognition
   - Saudi Tourism Authority recognition
   - Any government or regulatory body recognition — UAE or internationally
   - Any independent travel industry body awards
   - Any consumer or media voted awards — where Rayna won based on public
   or industry votes
   - World Travel Awards — past nominations or wins if any
   - Any newspaper or magazine awards — Best Tour Operator, Best Travel
   Company, etc.

*WHAT NOT TO INCLUDE:*

   - Awards from theme parks — Global Village, Motiongate, Ferrari World,
   etc.
   - Awards from hotels or hotel groups
   - Awards from airlines or airline partners
   - Any award where the awarding organization has a commercial
   relationship with Rayna

*FOR EACH AWARD — COMPILE THE FOLLOWING:*

   1. Name of award
   2. Awarding organization
   3. Year received
   4. Category — what exactly was the award for
   5. Online source — URL of any webpage, press release, or news article
   confirming this award. This is critical. If there is no online source, the
   award cannot be used for Wikipedia.
   6. Was there any press coverage of this award in any publication? If yes
   — name of publication and URL.

*WHERE TO FIND THIS INFORMATION:*

   - Check our website — raynatours.com
   <https://www.google.com/url?q=http://raynatours.com&source=gmail&ust=1780862521566000&sa=E>
   — we have awards displayed there
   - Check our office — physical award certificates and trophies
   - Check with Deepak and Senthil — they have been with the company for
   many years and will remember significant awards
   - Search online — "Rayna Tours award" on Google. Check all results.
   - Check our social media archives — any award announcements posted in
   previous years
   - Check TripAdvisor directly — our TripAdvisor profile shows all
   certificates and awards received

*DELIVERABLE:*
A clean document — Word or PDF — listing all independent awards with all
details above. This document will be used as evidence for our Wikipedia
submission. The stronger and more complete this document, the faster our
Wikipedia article gets approved.

*Deadline: June 12th.*

This is important. We have been operating for 15 years and have received
significant recognition. All of that recognition needs to be documented and
used. Do not leave anything out — even small awards count if they are from
independent organizations.

*Your experience, our responsibility.*

emails.subject: World Travel Awards 2026 — Enter Four Categories Immediately | Action Required
emails.body:
Hi Aparna and Manish,

The World Travel Awards 2026 Call for Entries is now open. This is one of
the most recognized awards programmes in the global travel industry — known
as the Oscars of travel. Winners include Emirates, Atlantis, Qatar Airways,
and Etihad. Being nominated or winning gives Rayna significant brand
credibility, press coverage, and importantly — independent third party
recognition that supports our Wikipedia notability case and PR strategy.

I want Rayna to enter this year. Here is exactly what to do.
------------------------------

*STEP 1 — SUBMIT ENTRIES IMMEDIATELY*
Go to worldtravelawards.com/enter
<https://www.google.com/url?q=http://worldtravelawards.com/enter&source=gmail&ust=1780862120516000&sa=E>
and submit Rayna Tours for the following four categories only. Do not enter
any other categories — we are concentrating our votes on these four to
maximize our chances.

   1. *Dubai's Leading Tour Operator* — Our primary target. We are the
   largest ground operator in Dubai with owned desert camps, hot air balloons,
   marine operations, floating restaurants, and 500+ vehicles. 25 million+
   guests served. No competitor in Dubai matches our owned ground operations.
   2. *Dubai's Leading Transfer Company* — 500+ vehicles operating daily
   across Dubai. We dominate this space.
   3. *UAE's Leading Tour Operator* — Natural extension of our Dubai
   position across the full UAE.
   4. *Middle East's Leading Online Travel Company* — Connects our AI
   transformation, B2C platform, and global expansion to 116 cities.

Submit all four entries today. Deadline is approaching — do not delay.
------------------------------

*STEP 2 — PLAN THE VOTING CAMPAIGN*
World Travel Awards is a voting-based award — the organization with the
most votes wins. This is where Rayna has a massive advantage. We have:

   - 1.8 million customer database
   - Hundreds of active B2B travel agents across UAE, India, and Saudi
   - Corporate partners — banks, companies, universities
   - 100+ hotel desk contacts across UAE
   - Our own team of 1,600 people

Once we receive our nomination confirmation, plan the following voting
campaign:

*Customer voting push — email + WhatsApp + push notification:*
Send a dedicated campaign to our full UAE database asking customers to vote
for Rayna in all four categories. Keep it simple — one click link to the
voting page. Message: "You've experienced Rayna. Now vote for us. Help us
become Dubai's Leading Tour Operator." Send twice — once when voting opens,
once one week before voting closes.

*B2B agent voting push:*
Send a dedicated email to all active B2B agents on our portal asking them
to vote. Travel agents and industry professionals carry extra weight in WTA
voting. Personal appeal from the founder level will increase response rate.

*Corporate partner push:*
Ask Azhar to mobilize all corporate partners — ask HR departments to share
the voting link with their employees as a quick way to support their travel
partner.

*Team voting:*
All 1,600 Rayna staff must vote. Vaibhav to coordinate internally.

*Social media campaign:*
Nihad's team to run a social media voting campaign across UAE, India, and
Saudi — Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn. "Vote for Rayna — Dubai's Leading
Tour Operator." Include the voting link in bio and all posts for the
duration of the voting period.
------------------------------

*STEP 3 — USE FOR PR AND WIKIPEDIA*
Whether we win or are nominated — both are valuable:

   - Nomination announcement — send a press release to Gulf News, Khaleej
   Times, Arabian Business, and Economic Times immediately when nominations
   are confirmed
   - Win announcement — major press release to all publications, social
   media campaign, email to full database
   - Wikipedia — WTA nomination and win count as significant independent
   industry recognition. Add to Wikipedia evidence file immediately.

------------------------------

*DEADLINES:*

   - Submit all four entries — *Today or tomorrow at the latest*
   - Confirm entry submissions to me — *June 9th*
   - Voting campaign plan ready — *June 15th*

This is a real opportunity to win four awards that will significantly boost
Rayna's brand authority across UAE, India, and Saudi. Do not miss the entry
window.

*Your experience, our responsibility.*

<https://www.google.com/url?q=http://raynatours.com/in/&source=gmail&ust=1780853606955000&sa=E>

------------------------------

emails.subject: RE: Pending SEO Issues, Growth Recommendations & Support Requirements
emails.body:
Hi Aparna,

Thank you for this detailed report. This is exactly the kind of proactive
communication I expect. I have reviewed everything carefully and here is
where things stand.

*ONE — Technical SEO Issues*
We have already engaged Sandstorm Digital Worldwide for a full 12-week SEO,
GEO, and AEO programme. Their scope covers the majority of technical issues
you have flagged — XML sitemap, OG URL mismatches, hidden H1 tags, FAQ
schema, organizational schema, staging subdomain indexation, Core Web
Vitals, image alt text, and more.

Senthil will coordinate a briefing between you, Manish, and Sandstorm as
soon as he is back this week. Your role will be to work alongside Sandstorm
— not duplicate their work. Please prepare a list of all open tickets you
have raised so Sandstorm can prioritize accordingly.

*TWO — Homepage*
You are correct that the homepage being a replica of the activities page is
a problem. I have addressed this today. Asad has been briefed to design a
dedicated homepage for raynatours.com
<https://www.google.com/url?q=http://raynatours.com&source=gmail&ust=1780853547585000&sa=E>
with the complete company story, trust signals, owned assets, destination
portfolio, and review badges. Deadline for mockup is June 20th. Once
approved, Anwar's team will implement the separation of homepage and
activities page. Organizational schema can then be implemented properly.

*THREE — Country-Specific URL Folders*
I understand your recommendation and the logic is correct. However the
timing is wrong. We are currently rebuilding the entire website with
Sandstorm, launching an AI content engine that will produce hundreds of new
pages, and going live across 116 cities simultaneously. Adding
country-specific URL folders on top of all this creates enormous complexity
and will slow everything down significantly.

Instead — please work with Sandstorm to implement *hreflang tags* on our
existing pages. This signals to Google which market each page is most
relevant for — UAE, India, or Saudi — and gives us 60-70% of the benefit of
country folders with almost zero development work. This is already part of
Sandstorm's scope. Country-specific URL folders will be revisited in 2027
once the website is stable and content engine is proven.

*FOUR — Pre-Launch Content Review Process*
You are right that pages should not go live with poor quality content.
However page-by-page human SEO approval is not practical at our scale — we
are about to go live with hundreds of pages across 116 cities. This would
take months and defeat the purpose of our AI content engine.

Instead — Sandstorm will provide us with a fixed AEO content template by
Week 4 of their engagement. Every page produced by our AI content engine
will follow this template automatically. The template ensures every page is
SEO, AEO, and GEO ready from the moment it is created. No page-by-page
human review needed because the quality is built into the template itself.

Your role is to work with Sandstorm to define and validate this template —
that is where your expertise adds the most value. Once the template is
approved, the AI engine handles the rest at scale.

*FIVE — Budget Centralization*
Agreed. SEO budget should not be dependent on individual sales heads.
Senthil will set up a centralized SEO budget under your team. No more
interruptions to link building or tool subscriptions because a sales head
paused spending.

*SIX — Your Responsibilities Going Forward*
The following tasks remain with you and Manish — these are NOT covered by
Sandstorm:

   - Wikipedia article — research notability, compile existing press
   coverage, draft article, submit once 3+ major articles are published.
   Deadline for notability assessment — June 10th.
   - Wikidata entity creation — deadline June 9th.
   - Brand entity standardization — Google Business, LinkedIn, Facebook,
   Trustpilot, TripAdvisor, all directories. Deadline June 10th.
   - PR outreach — Gulf News, Arabian Business, Economic Times, Forbes
   India, local print in Pune and Delhi. Brief already sent to you.
   - Work with Sandstorm on AEO content template definition — this is your
   most important near-term task alongside Sandstorm.

*SEVEN — Senior Travel Writer*
Your recommendation to hire a senior travel writer with SEO and AEO
experience is approved in principle. Please share a job description and
salary expectation with Senthil for review. We need someone who understands
travel, writes for humans and AI engines simultaneously, and can review and
improve AI-generated content before it goes live.

Good work on this report. Keep this standard of communication going forward.

*Your experience, our responsibility.*

redirects to raynatours.com/activities

This needs to change. The new dedicated homepage will sit at raynatours.com
<https://www.google.com/url?q=http://raynatours.com&source=gmail&ust=1780852626467000&sa=E>.
The activities page moves to raynatours.com/activities

once design is approved.
------------------------------

*DEADLINE*
Homepage mockup for my review — *June 20th.*
Nothing goes live without my approval.

This is a priority. The homepage is the first thing every customer,

*Your experience, our responsibility.*

emails.subject: Seed List Setup — Email Campaign Testing Process | Action Required
emails.body:
Hi Malik / Anket,

Before any email campaign or WhatsApp broadcast goes to market, I want a
seed list testing process in place. Here is what I need you to build and
set up.

*SEED LIST — 10 MEMBERS*

Identify 10 members for the seed list from the marketing and distribution
team. Each member must have email accounts across multiple providers —
Gmail, Outlook/Hotmail, Yahoo, and any other major provider relevant to our
markets. This way every campaign is tested across all major email clients
before going live.

*Mandatory seed list members:*

   - Manoj Tulsani — receives all campaigns for visibility but approval not
   required
   - Anket — email marketing lead, mandatory approver
   - Yourself — Malik
   - AI user — see below
   - 6 additional team members you identify from the marketing team
   including Vaibhav and Senthil

*AI USER — CRITICAL*
One of the 10 seed list members must be an AI user. This AI user will
automatically check every campaign before it goes live and verify:

   - Email lands in inbox, not spam
   - All links are working correctly
   - Content renders correctly on mobile and desktop
   - Brand line "Your experience, our responsibility." is present
   - No broken images or formatting errors

Please build this AI checker as part of the seed list system. It runs
automatically — no human needs to trigger it.

*APPROVAL PROCESS — 4 APPROVALS REQUIRED*
Only 4 approvals are needed before a campaign goes live. This keeps the
process fast without creating bottlenecks.

*The 4 required approvals:*

   1. *AI user* — automatic check, must pass first before anything else
   2. *Anket* — mandatory, must always approve
   3. *Any 2 from the remaining seed list members* — whoever reviews first.
   No fixed names. This ensures the process never gets blocked if someone is
   travelling or unavailable.

Manoj receives every campaign and can flag issues at any time — but his
approval is not required to proceed. The campaign goes live once AI + Anket
+ any 2 others have approved.

If any of the 4 required approvers finds an issue — campaign is held until
fixed and re-tested.

*THE PROCESS — Before Every Campaign Goes to Market:*

   1. Campaign sent to all 10 seed list members across all their email
   accounts — minimum 24 hours before going to full database
   2. AI user runs automatic check immediately — flags any issues
   3. If AI check passes — human approvers are notified to review
   4. Once AI + Anket + any 2 others approve — campaign goes live
   automatically
   5. If any issue found at any stage — campaign held, fixed, re-tested
   from step 1

*Deadline to set this up: June 13th.*

Note — Anket is the primary owner of email marketing execution. You are
building the system. Once built, hand over to Anket with full documentation
on how it works.

*Your experience, our responsibility.*
