emails.subject: New Brand Line + Brand Guidelines Audit — Action Required
emails.body:
Hi Asad,

Two things for you to action immediately.

*ONE — New Brand Positioning Line (Effective Immediately):*

*English: "Your experience, our responsibility."*
*Hindi: "Aapka safar, hamari zimmedari."*

Please incorporate this into the homepage redesign you are already working
on. Specifically:

   1. Next to the logo on the homepage
   2. Header section of the About Us page
   3. Closing line on all marketing communication templates — email,
   WhatsApp, social

Mockup due for my review by June 15th. Nothing goes live without my
approval.

*TWO — Brand Guidelines Audit (Complete by June 15th):*

We are building brand consistency across all touchpoints. Before we roll
out the new brand line everywhere, I need a complete audit of where we
currently stand. Please review and report on the following:

   1. *Social media visuals* — Are all Rayna social media accounts (UAE,
   India, Saudi) using consistent logo, colors, cover images, and visual
   style? List everything that is inconsistent or outdated.
   2. *Email signatures* — This is a priority. We have 1,600 staff
   communicating daily with suppliers, customers, partners, and banks. Every
   email is a brand touchpoint. The new standardized signature must include
   three things:
      - Link to raynatours.com
      - Link to our About Us page — raynatours.com/about-us — labeled "Our
      Story" so recipients can learn about Rayna and build trust
      - The new brand line: "Your experience, our responsibility."
   Please design a clean, professional signature template with all three
   elements. This will be rolled out to all staff once approved.
   3. *Marketing templates* — Email marketing templates, WhatsApp broadcast
   templates, social media post templates — are they all visually consistent
   with the Rayna brand? List what needs to be updated.
   4. *Website* — You already have the full homepage redesign brief. As
   part of the audit, confirm that the new brand line and visual direction is
   consistent across all website pages, not just the homepage.
   5. *Offline materials* — Business cards, brochures, any printed
   materials — are they consistent with the current brand? Flag anything that
   needs to be updated when we roll out the new line.

*Deliverable by June 15th:*

   1. Brand audit report — what is consistent, what is not, what needs to
   change
   2. New standardized email signature template with brand line, website
   link, and About Us link
   3. Homepage redesign mockup for my approval

Once I approve everything, we will roll out to the full leadership team and
Nihad's social media team will update all channels accordingly.

Thanks,
Manoj

emails.subject: New Brand Line — Add to Homepage Redesign
emails.body:
Hi Asad,

We have finalized our new brand positioning line. Please incorporate this
into the homepage redesign immediately.

*New Brand Line (English):*
"Your experience, our responsibility."

*New Brand Line (Hindi):*
"Aapka safar, hamari zimmedari."

*Where to use it:*

   1. Next to the logo on the homepage
   2. Header section of the About Us page
   3. Closing line on all marketing communications — email, WhatsApp, social

You have already received the full homepage design brief. This line should
be reflected throughout that redesign. The spirit behind it — we are a
destination expert and ground operator, not a marketplace — must come
through in the overall design direction as well.

Mockup due for my review by June 15th. Nothing goes live without my
approval.

Thanks,
Manoj

emails.subject: Please check if this is ok to go or u suggest some changes
emails.body:
As discussed, you are leading the mobile app launch coordination. Here is
the complete plan. Please confirm receipt and share your go/no-go status by
end of day today.

Launch Strategy — Phased by Market:

We are NOT going global on day one. Phased launch as follows:
UAE only — June 10th
India — June 25th (only if UAE stable with 4.0+ rating)
Saudi — July 1st
Global — July 15th

Before UAE Launch — Must Complete by June 9th:

Define go/no-go criteria with Anwar's team — what bugs are blockers vs
acceptable

Confirm testing on minimum 10 Android devices and 5 iPhone models
Full booking flow tested end to end — search, select, pay, confirmation
Customer support flow tested within app
Load speed verified — every page must load under 3 seconds
Push notifications tested
Offline behavior tested — what happens when connection drops mid booking
App Store and Google Play listings ready — screenshots, description,
keywords optimized
Post UAE Launch — Ongoing:
Daily bug report compiled and sent to vaibhav directly
Minimum 4.0 App Store and Google Play rating must be maintained at all times
If rating drops below 4.0 — pause expansion to next market immediately and
escalate to me
Market Expansion Schedule:

India June 25th — only if UAE stable for 2 weeks with 4.0+ rating
Saudi July 1st — only if India stable
Global July 15th — only after Saudi stable
Coordination with QA Agency:

The external QA agency you are onboarding must have access to the app
staging environment before June 9th. Get test credentials from Anwar by
June 7th and brief the agency immediately.
Important:
A two week delay is better than a bad launch. If June 10th is not
achievable, tell me today. Do not launch if it is not ready.
Please confirm by end of day:

Is June 10th UAE launch achievable?
Current testing status?
Any blockers?

Thanks,
Manoj

emails.subject: RE: work report
emails.body:
Dear Senthil Sir,

Please find below a summary of the tasks I completed during April and May.

As I was on leave for 22 days in April and 10 days in May, the work listed
below represents approximately one month's worth of completed tasks


Key Tasks Completed


*	Conducted daily website reviews, as multiple implementations are
currently in progress. Regular monitoring was carried out to identify
issues, analyze performance, and raise relevant tickets in ClickUp.

*	Tools used: Screaming Frog, Ahrefs, and Claude for analysis.

*	Created and updated Footer SOPs. As discussed with Vaibhav, the
previous SOP covered only two to three tabs. We are now expanding the footer
structure:

*	Packages and Activities sections are completed.
*	Visa and Cruise sections will be updated today and tomorrow.

*	Created title tags and meta descriptions for Waterlink pages/review
title and meta description of Rayna tours(non performing pages) 
*	Wrote 10 Hindi articles targeting the Indian market to improve
rankings and organic traffic.
*	Regularly reviewed and monitored SOP implementation across all page
types.

*       Completed the DriveTheThrill website analysis and shared the report
with the concerned team.

Report:
https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1wocfCzp_Dx0kpefw3OioPrAr9w8AJZaUdJdG
66-LRfg/edit?gid=0#gid=0

*       Worked on maintaining consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number)
details across platforms.

Tracking Sheet:
https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1NIZhG2QrbnuzJXasPxURBy9G4lWWMmgRQgXE
liHDMXk/edit?gid=0#gid=0

*	Reviewed SEO tasks and provided guidance, support, and training to
SEO team members to ensure process compliance and quality standards.

*       Started managing my personal Instagram account last month to build
my professional presence and occasionally promote Rayna Tours' services and
expertise outside office hours.
Instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/iamaaparnasisodia/

 

Please let me know if you need any additional details or clarification on
any of the above tasks.

 

From: Aparna Sisodia [mailto:aparna@raynatours.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, March 11, 2026 12:11 PM
To: 'Senthil Velan' <senthil@raynatours.com>
Cc: 'vaibhav' <vaibhav@raynatours.com>; 'manoj@raynatours.com'
<manoj@raynatours.com>
Subject: RE: Traffic & Ranking Drop - Key Factors and Action Plan

 

Dear Sir,

I am sharing an update on the tasks that have been completed so far, which
were discussed and planned last month, along with some additional SEO
initiatives we have started considering the current situation affecting
travel searches.


Completed / Ongoing SEO Activities


1. SOP-Based Content Changes
Almost all content has been updated as per the defined SOP guidelines. The
"How to Apply" section for 11 visa pages is still pending, as Rajkumar and
his team are working to finalize the content. The SIC packages are being
handled by agency. The update is expected by next week.

2. New Design 
Design changes are still in progress. category pages, country pages, and
travel guide pages will be  fully implemented in the next phase.

3. Title & Meta Description Review
This is a continuous process and will remain ongoing as part of regular
optimization.

4. AI-Generated Duplicate Content
The previously identified AI-generated duplicate content has been reviewed
and updated.

5. Blog Activity
Blog activity has been resumed, and we have started publishing content
again.

6. Technical Issues (Pending)
The issues have already been raised. Some changes have been implemented, and
the updates can be reviewed.

7. Small Supporting Sites
We have started working on the small supporting sites as well.

8. Old Backlinks
Some old backlinks have been corrected. In cases where we did not receive
responses from webmasters, we will implement redirects with the help of
Sumit this week.

9. New Backlink Creation
This is a continuous activity. The February backlink report has been shared
for review.

10. Seasonal Pages
This has already been raised with the IT team.

  _____  


Additional SEO Activities Considering the Current Situation


Due to the current situation and travel concerns, we have also started
implementing additional SEO and branding strategies to maintain organic
traffic and build user trust.

1. Travel Awareness & Safety Content
We are regularly publishing travel awareness articles and web stories,
including:

*       https://blog.raynatours.com/uae-travel-safety-update/

*       https://blog.raynatours.com/why-travelers-trust-rayna-tours/

*
https://blog.raynatours.com/web-stories/dubai-safest-travel-destination/

o
https://blog.raynatours.com/web-stories/middle-east-travel-safety-update/

2. Travel Updates & Advisories
We are updating travel advisories and situation-based updates regularly on
the blog to keep the information current. One writer has been assigned to
quickly publish news-based articles (for example airspace updates or travel
restrictions) so we can capture search demand immediately.



3. Press Release Distribution
The SEO team is publishing and distributing press releases regularly across
multiple platforms, including:

*
https://www.issuewire.com/explore-the-best-of-europe-in-2026-with-exclusive-
holiday-packages-from-rayna-tours-1859269323341542

*
https://prfree.org/@raynatours/rayna-tours-and-travels-announces-eid-al-fitr
-travel-deals-fyxl3q4ql

*       https://www.travpr.com/pr-123300-rayna-tours-and-travels.html

*
https://www.prlog.org/13130812-traveling-during-global-tensions-how-rayna-to
urs-and-travels-helps-y

*
https://www.openpr.com/news/4412246/traveling-during-global-tensions-how-ray
na-tours-and-travels

*
https://www.prlog.org/13131746-uae-tourism-remains-steady-despite-current-de
velopments.html

*
https://prfree.org/@raynatours/uae-tourism-remains-steady-despite-current-de
velopments-m8ttdygl1afq

o
https://prfree.org/@vinodkamble/demand-for-dubai-tourist-visas-remains-stron
g-says-rayna-tours-cl67xpc1lk84  

4. Forum Participation
We have started participating in travel forums and discussion platforms,
sharing travel awareness updates and relevant information.

5. Informational Keyword Targeting
We are also targeting high-demand informational keywords such as:

*       Dubai travel advisory

*       Is Dubai safe now

*       UAE travel restrictions

*       Dubai flights today

*       Dubai visa for Indians

6. Alternative Destination Focus
We are increasing focus on alternative destinations and packages so that
traffic and bookings can continue from other markets.

India, Thailand, Malaysia, Indonesia, Vietnam, Singapore, Europe, Turkey,
Sri Lanka, Egypt, Mauritius, Kenya, Seychelles, maldives, Japan, Uzbekistan,
Georgia, Armenia, Kazakhstan

7. Social Media Authority
For social media updates, I am coordinating with Vaibhav so we can align
with the social media team and publish regular travel updates on:

*       LinkedIn

*       Instagram

*       Twitter

  _____  

Additionally, I am currently in discussion with a few agencies that
specialize in AI search optimization and Online Reputation Management (ORM).
They are providing free audits, which will help me understand what other
organizations in the industry are doing and identify any additional
opportunities for improvement.

I will receive five audit reports by this Friday. I have already received
one report, but the recommendations are quite basic and mostly cover
activities that we are already implementing. Once I receive all the reports,
I will review them and share any useful insights or opportunities that could
help improve Rayna Tours' visibility and strengthen our online reputation.

Please let me know if there are any additional suggestions or priorities I
should focus on @all.

 

From: Aparna Sisodia [ <mailto:aparna@raynatours.com>
mailto:aparna@raynatours.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, February 11, 2026 3:13 PM
To: 'Senthil Velan' < <mailto:senthil@raynatours.com>
senthil@raynatours.com>
Cc: 'vaibhav' < <mailto:vaibhav@raynatours.com> vaibhav@raynatours.com>;
'manoj@raynatours.com' < <mailto:manoj@raynatours.com> manoj@raynatours.com>
Subject: RE: Traffic & Ranking Drop - Key Factors and Action Plan

 

Dear sir,

Thank you for your message.

Please find the proposed timelines below for each activity:

 

1.     SOP-Based Content Changes
By March 15, all existing content will be updated as per the SOPs.

2.     New Design Impact
Changes are still in progress. After category pages, country pages, and
travel guide pages are fully implemented, we will be in a better position to
evaluate the actual impact.

3.     Title & Meta Description Review
This is a continuous process and will remain ongoing as part of regular
optimization.

4.     AI-Generated Duplicate Content
Since this is not directly under my control, the Sales Head creates the
content based on their requirements. It is not always possible to share the
content with them on the same day. However, Rezmin is coordinating closely
and trying to fulfill all their requirements within their given timelines.
The existing AI-generated content will be reviewed by the first week of
March..

5.     Blog Activity Stopped
Since we are focusing on travel guide pages, blog strategy decisions need to
be finalized. Vaibhav can confirm whether we should continue blog posting or
fully align it with travel guides.

6.     Technical Issues (Pending)
We have already raised the issues. Currently, we do not have a fixed
timeline. I will coordinate with Vaibhav and Gaurav and get back to you with
an estimated resolution timeline.

7.     Travel Guide Pages (Upcoming Implementation)
We are working city-wise on travel guide content. Vaibhav can provide a
clearer timeline for full implementation.

8.     Small Supporting Sites
We will not be actively working on small sites going forward. Instead, we
will focus on building stronger and higher-quality backlinks for the main
site.

9.     Old Backlinks
We are targeting to resolve redirections and corrections within one month.

10.   New Backlink Creation
This is a continuous activity. I will share a monthly update with you,
Vaibhav, and Manoj sir regarding progress.

11.  Seasonal Pages Stopped
This has already been raised to IT 

 

I regularly share work and other updates with you all. Going forward, I will
include these updates as well in the same communication.

  _____  

 

From: Senthil Velan [ <mailto:senthil@raynatours.com>
mailto:senthil@raynatours.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, February 11, 2026 2:40 PM
To: Aparna Sisodia < <mailto:aparna@raynatours.com> aparna@raynatours.com>
Cc: vaibhav < <mailto:vaibhav@raynatours.com> vaibhav@raynatours.com>;
<mailto:manoj@raynatours.com> manoj@raynatours.com
Subject: Re: Traffic & Ranking Drop - Key Factors and Action Plan

 

Thanks Aparna. I would like to see timelines for each of the activities....

  _____  

From: Aparna Sisodia < <mailto:aparna@raynatours.com> aparna@raynatours.com>
Sent: Wednesday, 11 February 2026 12:07 PM
To:  <mailto:senthil@raynatours.com> senthil@raynatours.com <
<mailto:senthil@raynatours.com> senthil@raynatours.com>
Cc: vaibhav < <mailto:vaibhav@raynatours.com> vaibhav@raynatours.com>;
<mailto:manoj@raynatours.com> manoj@raynatours.com <
<mailto:manoj@raynatours.com> manoj@raynatours.com>
Subject: Traffic & Ranking Drop - Key Factors and Action Plan 

 

Dear Sir,

You may be wondering why our traffic is currently down and not meeting last
year's numbers, and why rankings have also declined. I would like to
highlight the key factors contributing to this situation and the corrective
actions we are taking. Once these are resolved, we should be able to recover
and perform even better than our previous rankings.

Below are the major points impacting us currently and how we are proceeding:

1.     SOP-Based Content Changes
As per the new SOPs, we are making structured content updates. Due to
continuous modifications, rankings are fluctuating temporarily. Once the
content stabilizes as per SOP standards, performance should improve.

2.     New Design Impact
After the new website design launch, rankings were temporarily affected.
This is common during structural changes, but recovery depends on
stabilizing technical and content elements quickly.

3.     Title & Meta Description Review
We are currently reviewing and optimizing titles and meta descriptions
across pages. During large-scale updates, short-term ranking fluctuations
are expected.

4.     AI-Generated Duplicate Content
Some product descriptions were created using AI (Content are similar to
other websites). We are rewriting such content.

5.     Blog Activity Stopped
We paused blog publishing for some time, which has affected our linking
strength. Regular blog updates help generate strong in-content links to
product pages. 

6.     Technical Issues (Pending)
There are still unresolved technical issues affecting performance:
<https://docs.google.com/document/d/1kyd3OJANQ8KbhtjuTVMZewJhZAGVheVICLyN7B-
aoH0/edit?tab=t.0>
https://docs.google.com/document/d/1kyd3OJANQ8KbhtjuTVMZewJhZAGVheVICLyN7B-a
oH0/edit?tab=t.0, Vaibhav is on it.

7.     Travel Guide Pages (Upcoming Implementation)
We are planning to introduce dedicated travel guide pages. This will
significantly improve content depth, internal linking, organic traffic, and
self-referral traffic across all products.

8.     Small Supporting Sites
Currently, no one is actively working on the small sites. Previously, these
sites generated quality backlinks and rankings. Since they are no longer
ranking well, this may also be impacting some of our main pages.

9.     Old Backlinks
Some old backlinks are pointing to outdated URLs. We are working on
redirections and contacting webmasters to update those links.

10.   New Backlink Creation
I have assigned fresh backlink targets to each SEO team member. They are
actively working to complete their monthly targets.

11.  Seasonal Pages Stopped
Some seasonal pages that previously generated strong traffic were completely
removed instead of being kept live for upcoming seasons. 

  _____  

Overall, this is a combination of content changes, technical challenges,
structural updates, and backlink adjustments. With consistent execution over
the next few months, we should see steady recovery and stronger growth.

emails.subject: **Subject:** Urgent — External QA Agency | Website + App Testing
emails.body:
Hi All,

We need to immediately onboard an external QA testing agency to work
alongside our internal team as a permanent quality assurance partner for
raynatours.com and our mobile app.

This is urgent. App launches UAE on June 10th. We cannot afford bad ratings
or bugs at launch.

**Gaurav — you are leading this.**

Your immediate tasks:

1. Use the brief below to approach minimum three external QA agencies today
2. Get proposals back by June 7th
3. Present me the top two options by June 8th with your recommendation
4. Selected agency must begin mobile app testing by June 9th — one day
before launch

**please get support if required for:**

- Access to staging environment
- Test accounts with dummy payment credentials
- Full product documentation
- Direct availability for technical queries from the agency

**What to look for in the agency:**
- Uses AI testing tools — Testim, Mabl, or Katalon
- Experience testing travel or ecommerce platforms
- Can start within 48 hours
- Turnaround on full regression test — maximum 5 business days
- Arabic language UI testing capability
- Has a clear critical bug escalation process

**Questions to ask every agency:**
1. What AI testing tools do you use?
2. How many travel or ecommerce platforms have you tested?
3. Can you provide references from similar scale projects?
4. What is your turnaround time for a full regression test cycle?
5. Do you have Arabic language UI testing capability?
6. What is your process when a critical bug is found 24 hours before launch?

**Scope they must cover:**

Website — cross browser, cross device, UI/UX, performance, stress testing
at 10,000 concurrent users, payment gateway, booking flow end to end,
regression testing, broken links, SEO technical testing.

Mobile App — minimum 15 Android devices and 8 iPhones, OS versions Android
10+ and iOS 14+, push notifications, offline behavior, payment flow, App
Store and Google Play compliance, battery and memory usage.

AI Features — reservation agent accuracy, automated marketing content
formatting, trigger based notification flows.

Security — PCI compliance, GDPR and UAE data protection, API security, SQL
injection and XSS vulnerability.

**Ongoing expectation from the agency:**
- Detailed bug reports with severity — critical, high, medium, low
- Screenshots and screen recordings of every bug
- Retest confirmation after fixes
- Weekly status report
- Monthly quality health report
- WhatsApp availability during UAE business hours
- Critical bug turnaround — reported within 4 hours

**Important — do not select the cheapest agency. Select the best one with
travel or ecommerce experience. Quality assurance is not where we save
money.**

Please confirm receipt and share update by end of day today.

Thanks,
Manoj

emails.subject: The Future of Rayna Group
emails.body:
Dear Rayna Family,

I want to speak to you directly and honestly about something that will
shape the future of our company — and your careers.

We are undergoing a significant transformation at Rayna Group. Like many
companies around the world, we are implementing Artificial Intelligence
across our operations — in sales, customer service, marketing, and
back-office processes. This is not a small change. It will improve how we
work, how fast we serve customers, and how competitive we are as a business.

I will not sugarcoat it: over the coming months, some roles and processes
will change. Some positions will look very different. And yes — in some
areas, we will need fewer people to do the same work.

But here is what I want you to hear from me, directly:

I am not going to let this happen to you without warning. I am telling you
today — not the day it happens — because I believe you deserve that respect.

And more importantly, I believe there is a place for every motivated person
at Rayna in this new world — IF they are willing to grow with us.

**AI will not replace people who understand AI. It will replace people who
ignore it.**

So here is my ask of you: Start now. Learn. Explore. Ask questions. We will
be sharing resources, training opportunities, and internal programs to help
you develop new skills. The employees who lean into this change will find
new roles, new relevance, and new opportunities within Rayna Group.

This is the most honest message I can give you. The transformation is real.
The timeline is now. And the opportunity is yours to take.

I am proud of what we have built together. And I am committed to building
the next chapter — with as many of you as possible.

With respect and transparency,

Manoj
Founder, Rayna Group

The objective is to use these experiences as a relationship-building and partner familiarization initiative, where our key clients, prospects, and decision-making POCs can experience Rayna�s service quality first-hand. emails.subject: Concierge platform developments
emails.body:
Dear All

Below are some of the recommended changes which will help us do better for concierge sales; we do have some of the features existing in our new platforms.


  *
Booking flow - The concierge booking path is search based today like a B2B, can they have the path similar to b2c where they book without search, the city search can be same like our b2c where we have a tile for each cities. Option to map cities to users so dubai ones dont see london city tiles.
  *
Login - Option to skip login otp since the shift keeps changing and they may not have email of the original user.
  *
User - User functionality where the head can create users for team with certain permission access, currently its flat and users can only see retail rates.
  *
Create and share cart / reservation with customer info for guest to pay directly and the services to be delivered directly on the customer email - explained to Vaibhav in detail
  *
Checkout Deduction or addition - In the instance where we give net rates to concierge and they are doing the markup; the addition deduction option is only at the admin of the website which is us and not for any of the concierges as well.
  *
Personalized platform with hotel Branding on login page, also option to feature their inhouse services such as spa and F&B. (this is very prevalent in UK, USA)
  *
UI and UX of the platform: Currently they land on city list page, ideally we should be able to bring them to a category type home page for quick bookings without search.
  *
Concierge dashboard - The dashboard currently is not report friendly, it just shows the bookings graph. Make it more user-friendly and provide insights like today's bookings panel: all tours/transfers sorted by departure time.
  *
Once we go live with new operations system, the driver details and other information should be visible in their dashboard to reduce manual coordination.
  *
Commission tracker: how much the concierge (or their hotel) has earned this month. A key motivator for repeat use.


Best Regards

Deepak

emails.subject: Approval Request to Generate Complimentary Experience Codes for Partner Engagement
emails.body:
Dear Mr. Senthil,

 

Hope you are doing well.

 

I discuss this with Mr. Manoj and further to our in-person conversation, we have decided to introduce Complimentary Rayna experience gift vouchers for our POCs across our Partnerships, Corporate, and Edutainment verticals.

 

The objective is to use these experiences as a relationship-building and partner familiarization initiative, where our key clients, prospects, and decision-making POCs can experience Rayna’s service quality first-hand. This will help us create stronger engagement, build trust, and position Rayna beyond the usual commercial proposal approach.

 

Digital Gift Vouchers (Format sample attached)


Sr. No.

Complimentary Experience

Discount %

Pax Size

No. of Coupon Codes Requested

Validity


1

Jet Ski Experience – Dubai Marina

100% Off

2 Pax

20 Codes

3 Months


2

Jet Car Experience – Dubai Marina

100% Off

2 Pax

20 Codes

3 Months


3

Hot Air Balloon Experience

100% Off

2 Pax

20 Codes

3 Months


4

VIP Desert Safari Experience

100% Off

2 Pax

20 Codes

3 Months


5

Other Selected Rayna Services

100% Off

2 Pax

20 Codes

3 Months

 

To make the process smooth and trackable, I would like to request your approval to generate 20 coupon codes with 100% discount, each valid for 2 pax per Rayna activity. These codes can be used directly on our website to process the bookings at zero cost, while keeping the booking flow, service confirmation, and internal tracking properly recorded.

 

Once approved, we can align with the website/tech and operations teams to create the codes, define validity, set usage limits, and maintain a tracker for transparency and control. 

 

Please approve us to proceed with gathering these coupon codes so we can start using the initiative for high-value partnership and sales opportunities going forward.

 

Thanks & Best Regards,
